results.name: getStages: BOTH tenants see the same global catalog (StageTemplate is global)
getOverview tenant A: stage 1 inProgress count = 1 (excludes B)
getOverview tenant B: stage 1 inProgress count = 1 (excludes A)
pilot ON, tenant A: getTimeline(tenantB-employee-id) raises NotFoundException
pilot ON, tenant A: getStageDetails employees exclude tenant B
pilot ON, tenant A: findWorkPermits returns ONLY tenant A
pilot ON, tenant A: findVisas returns ONLY tenant A
concurrent ALS frames isolated (each sees their own totalEmployees=1)
pilot OFF: legacy aggregates include both tenants (totalEmployees=2, workPermits=2)
source: every Phase 2.26 mutation uses legacyPrisma; reads use relation filter / tenantWhere
